pages.text: Whitecough is a chest infection, maybe not as deadly as Greencough, but still dangerous. If Whitecough is left untreated, it can eventually become Greencough, which is way worse...$(br2)Whitecough will make a cat feel weak and cough depending on the severity. Whitecough usually appears in cold and damp weather, and it is more common in Leaf-bare too. $(br)
pages.title: Whitecough
Whitecough
pages.text: Whitecough, as well as Greencough, can be treated using Catmint. These will help a cat fight the infection until it's gone.$(br)

pages.title: Whitecough
pages.text: Whitecough can also be treated with Juniper Berries. These berries might not be as tasty as Catmint, but will definitely help fight the infection.$(br)
